summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MediSeller online pharmacy MVP. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), major frontend functionality working, but identified critical product listing display issue preventing product cards from rendering on products page.

ui_bugs.issue: Product cards not rendering on /products page despite API returning data successfully
ui_bugs.details: API calls return products correctly, but ProductCard components not displaying in grid. Individual product pages work fine, cart functionality works, suggesting issue is specifically with products listing page rendering.

integration_issues.issue: Search results show 0 products even when products exist (e.g., Viagra search)

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent components

passed_tests: ✅ All backend API endpoints (18/18 tests passed)
✅ Homepage loads with hero section, categories, featured products, testimonials
✅ Product detail pages load and display correctly

critical: Fix product cards not rendering on products listing page (/products) - API data is available but not displaying
Fix product search results showing 0 products when matches exist
high: Investigate and fix the product grid rendering issue in ProductsPage component
Ensure ProductCard components properly receive and display product data from API
medium: Fix 401 errors in console (check authentication endpoints)
Add proper aria-describedby for Dialog components to fix accessibility warnings
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: Backend is 100% functional. Cart and individual product pages work perfectly. Issue is specifically with products listing page not rendering the product grid despite successful API calls.
